subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: See how the enemies of Christ persecuted and crucified Him, yet He loved them all. Man is like a tree. The tree lives to produce fruit. The fruit of man is love.
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @love of God, @bringing forth results; fruit, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ
